records.question: Which tracks are named exactly 'Daughter', composed by exactly 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder', and have associated genres and appear in playlists?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
JOIN playlist_tracks ON tracks.id = playlist_tracks.track_id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Daughter' AND tracks.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.id
FROM tracks t
WHERE t.name = 'Daughter'
  AND t.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder'
  AND t.genre_id IS NOT NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM playlist_tracks pt WHERE pt.track_id = t.id)

records.question: Which tracks are on the album titled Black Sabbath Vol. 4 (Remaster)?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE albums.title = 'Black Sabbath Vol. 4 (Remaster)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT t.id
FROM tracks t
JOIN albums a ON t.album_id = a.id
WHERE a.title = 'Black Sabbath Vol. 4 (Remaster)'

records.question: Which tracks named Wave (Vou te Contar) by composer Antonio Carlos Jobim are in the MPEG audio file format, cost exactly 0.99, last at most 271647 milliseconds, and have at least 9057557 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
WHERE tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND tracks.name = 'Wave (Vou te Contar)' AND tracks.milliseconds <= 271647 AND tracks.bytes >= 9057557 AND tracks.composer = 'Antonio Carlos Jobim' AND media_types.name = 'MPEG audio file'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT tracks.id
FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Wave (Vou te Contar)'
AND tracks.composer = 'Antonio Carlos Jobim'
AND media_types.name = 'MPEG audio'
AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99
AND tracks.milliseconds <= 271647
AND tracks.bytes >= 9057557

records.question: Which tracks called Folhas Secas from O Terço's album Compositores have a unit price of 0.99, last at least 161253 milliseconds, and have a file size of at least 5284522 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Folhas Secas' AND tracks.milliseconds >= 161253 AND tracks.bytes >= 5284522 AND artists.name = 'O Terço' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND albums.title = 'Compositores'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT t.id
FROM tracks t
JOIN albums a ON t.album_id = a.id
JOIN artists ar ON a.artist_id = ar.id
WHERE t.name = 'Folhas Secas'
AND ar.name = 'O Terço'
AND a.title = 'Compositores'
AND t.unit_price = 0.99
AND t.milliseconds >= 161253
AND t.bytes >= 5284522

records.question: Which tracks named Koyaanisqatsi composed by Philip Glass are Soundtracks with a Protected AAC audio file format, last exactly 206005 milliseconds, cost 0.99, and have at least 3305164 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
WHERE media_types.name = 'Protected AAC audio file' AND tracks.milliseconds = 206005 AND tracks.composer = 'Philip Glass' AND genres.name = 'Soundtrack' AND tracks.bytes >= 3305164 AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND tracks.name = 'Koyaanisqatsi'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT tracks.id
FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Koyaanisqatsi'
  AND tracks.composer = 'Philip Glass'
  AND genres.name = 'Soundtracks'
  AND media_types.name = 'Protected AAC audio file'
  AND tracks.milliseconds = 206005
  AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99
  AND tracks.bytes >= 3305164

records.question: Which tracks called True Believers by Billy Duffy/Ian Astbury have a length of exactly 308009 milliseconds, are exactly 9981359 bytes in size, and are priced at at least 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN invoice_lines ON tracks.id = invoice_lines.track_id
WHERE tracks.milliseconds = 308009 AND tracks.composer = 'Billy Duffy/Ian Astbury' AND tracks.name = 'True Believers' AND tracks.bytes = 9981359 AND invoice_lines.unit_price >= 0.99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT t.id
FROM tracks t
JOIN albums a ON t.album_id = a.id
JOIN artists ar ON a.artist_id = ar.id
WHERE t.name = 'True Believers'
AND ar.name = 'Billy Duffy/Ian Astbury'
AND t.milliseconds = 308009
AND t.bytes = 9981359
AND t.unit_price >= 0.99
